name: Little and To-be-Naughty Plushie
descs:
Deal +10% damage against enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' at Combat Start

Take -20% damage from enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' at Combat Start

Allies with Pride Affinity Attack Skills deal +20% damage against enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' instead.

Allies with Pride Affinity Attack Skills take -30% damage from enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' instead.
